<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:34 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108 95 48 49]>Oh? <unk[5:0]>Did you pass the interview too?


<Size=80>He obviously did. Why else would he come strolling
into a place like this? Ugh, why'd I even bring it up?<Size=100><PageBreak><unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>Er...<unk[5:0]>just forget it. It's not important.

investigating. It's fascinating.

It claims that this stone statue should be
able to grant us an "<Color=red>ancient power<Color=white>."

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 48]>没错，<unk[5:0]>这无比<Color=red>可疑的石像<Color=white>……<unk[5:0]>
一定就是大名鼎鼎的<Color=red>魔像<Color=white>了。
<unk[3:0:263]>我手上正好有一份文献，
解释了所谓<Color=red>“神代之力”<Color=white>……
上面提到：<unk[5:0]>
“该力量能够即刻<Color=red>记忆自己组合过的物体<Color=white>，
并将其<Color=red>瞬间制作出来<Color=white>。”<unk[5:0]>
也就是说……
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:20 80 97 105 110 102 117 108 95 48 49]>凡是制作过的东西，
都能一下子重现出来，没错吧？
如果能拥有这份力量，我们依……<unk[5:1]>呃，不是……
我们调查队就能加快探索此地的步伐了。
根据文献记载，这份力量要从魔像那里获得，
而我正在研究具体应该怎么做……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 48]>沒錯，<unk[5:0]>這尊非常<Color=red>可疑的石像<Color=white>……<unk[5:0]>

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 48]>That's right. This <Color=red>peculiar stone statue<Color=white>
is nothing less than one of the fabled
<Color=red>constructs<Color=white>.
<unk[3:0:263]>In fact, I have some writing here that
explains this so-called "<Color=red>ancient power<Color=white>"
in detail.
It reads, <unk[5:0]>"This ability will allow you
to commit <Color=red>any structure you create<Color=white>
to memory.
"Any object committed to memory
can be <Color=red>instantly reproduced<Color=white>."

<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:20 80 97 105 110 102 117 108 95 48 49]>Just think of it! If we could instantly
re-create anything we'd ever made...

the Yi—<unk[5:1]> Er, I mean, the survey team's,
uh...investigation of this land would be
swift and unstoppable!
The text further claims that this construct
should be able to grant us that power.
Oh, we just have to wake it up!
